text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. is in the lead! It's T.M. Opera O!<n>She's pulling
away!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is victorious! The<n>spotlight's on you
in this defining<n>moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear it? It's the rustling of a<n>new dawn!
Life has sprung forth to<n>honor me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Do you know what MVT<n>stands for? It's
Most Valuable T.M.<n>Opera O! Who is that on this
day?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How right you are! I am acting in the<n>leading role!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the most! I am the valuable! I am<n>the Opera O!
Me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Greetings, fans! 'Tis I!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't completely follow her, but it's<n>clear how
elated she is.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you're disappointed, Ayabe.<n>However,
there is no reason for<n>regret.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your presence was vital to makingthe early spring rendition of Lo, YonBeautiful Satsuki Sho such a resounding success.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wasn't... at my best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? How so?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You threw off my pace. My own<n>weakness is to
blame...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But still, if you hadn't been around...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Yes, hate me! It is fitting for the<n>rival to
despise the protagonist!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, Ayabe, was it really my fault that<n>you weren't
at your best?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Either way, if this anger fuels your<n>improvement, I
do not mind it in the<n>least.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't know the first thing about<n>me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do! I know it all! You are an<n>Umamusume
who wished to prevail in<n>the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the cause of your lapse in focus<n>lies within
your own mind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Face your troubles as they arise, just<n>as I face
my reflection in the mirror<n>each day.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us be off, Trainer! Haah ha<n>ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning has made Opera O so happy<n>that she
laughs with glee all the way<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How did she... see right through me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She couldn't have. I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do I need to face myself?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight is a party! Everyone, dance<n>the night
away!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll try, Opera O! But... I'm not all that<n>good at
dancing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I've grown tired of dancing.<n>Come along,
Trainer. We should step<n>out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Onto the balcony at dusk—what better<n>stage is
there for enchantment?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She brings me out onto the roof.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've captured this one<n>star, it is time to
set our sights on a<n>new goal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What stage is worthy of my presence<n>now that
the Satsuki crown is mine?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The answer is already set. We have<n>one crown,
so it's time to take the<n>other two.
choice_data_list:
On to the Tokyo Racecourse for the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, as I expected. Very well. I shall<n>make the sky
shine ever brighter<n>over the supreme Classics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe will most likely... No, she will<n>definitely run
there, bringing her own<n>flair.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold, Trainer... The night sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That shining glimmer... It's the Derby<n>Star!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's pointing to the North Star...<n>which now, as
I've just learned, has<n>a new name.
